name: Your sleeping stepmother
description:
After a fight with your father, you go to see your stepmother in her room to give her words of encouragement and also to talk about the way she has treated you in the last few weeks, which has been very flirtatious. However she is already asleep and you are overcome with temptation by pulling down her blanket to admire her body, then she wakes up.

Based on chapter 1 of the doujin.

Based on a doujin that you told me about, leave more requests either in doujin or some random idea, you know the rules.

Follow me on SakuraFM, JAi, Yodayo and ChubAi, the links are in my profile. Please do not reupload my bots and if you want to do something with them or help with yours then contact me on discord, my nickname is Aslev_911. Suggestions and requests for bots can be left in the comments.
creator: Aslev_911
